summary: Iteration 2 â€” Full backend + desktop + mobile regression after the visual redesign. Backend 4/4 pytest pass; the `_id`â†’`id` fix on GET /api/contacts is verified (response now exposes `id` only, no `_id`). Desktop: hero, yellow Book session pill, all 6 nav links smooth-scroll to their sections, numbered SectionHeaders 01..08 render, yellow marquee under hero, artists video swap, gallery lightbox open/close, 5 pricing cards with middle 'Hverdags-session' highlighted by 'Mest vĂ¦rdi' yellow badge, contact form POSTs to /api/contact (200) and shows success. Mobile (390x844): hamburger opens mobile menu, mobile-nav-priser scrolls to #priser, hero/CTAs stack full-width, pricing collapses to 1 column, contact form is fillable. ONE MOBILE BUG: #artister overflows the viewport by ~22px on mobile causing horizontal scroll (docW=412 vs winW=390).

ui_bugs.issue: Horizontal overflow on mobile (~22px). At viewport 390x844, document.scrollWidth=412 because content inside #artister grid extends from left=20 to right=412. Inner divs (lg:col-span-2 wrapper, the aspect-video iframe wrapper, and each video-item button list) measure 392px wide. This is the only section that overflows â€” all other sections (studie, proces, priser, udgivelser, kontakt) report scrollWidth == 390. Likely cause: `grid lg:grid-cols-3` on the inner container combined with the iframe/aspect-video item's intrinsic min-content/min-width:auto pushing the column wider than the viewport on small screens.
Tap target is 34x34px â€” below the recommended ~44px minimum for mobile touch targets (Apple HIG / Material).

issues: Third-party Spotify embed still logs noisy console errors in headless Chromium â€” explicitly out-of-scope per request, not blocking.

action_items: Fix #artister mobile horizontal overflow. Quickest fix: ensure children cannot exceed parent width â€” add `min-w-0` to `Reveal.lg:col-span-2` and to the video-list `flex flex-col` container, and/or set `max-w-full overflow-hidden` on the inner grid. Also consider `min-w-0` on the iframe wrapper.
(Optional) Increase mobile-menu-toggle tap target to >=44x44 (e.g., p-2.5 â†’ p-3 or add `min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px]`).
critical_code_review_comments: Artists.jsx: child containers inside the grid lack `min-w-0`, which is the standard tailwind/flex/grid fix to prevent intrinsic content (iframes, long text) from forcing the column to overflow the parent. The lg-only constraints (`lg:max-h-[480px] lg:overflow-y-auto`) do nothing on mobile, so the list buttons size to content.
server.py is now consistent: GET /api/contacts has `response_model_by_alias=False`; verified in tests that response items contain only `id` (no `_id`). Good fix.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True is still in backend/.env â€” browsers reject credentialed CORS with wildcard; harmless here (no auth) but should be tightened pre-production.
Hero.jsx headline is still split across spans/lines; for testability consider wrapping the full text in a `[data-testid='hero-headline']` element so exact-text selectors work.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (strengthened to assert response items contain `id` and NOT `_id`)

success_rate.frontend: Desktop 100% of review items; Mobile 95% â€” 1 horizontal-overflow bug in #artister

seed_data_creation: Created additional TEST_ prefixed contacts via pytest (TEST_Patrick QA, TEST_minimal) and via Playwright on desktop (TEST_Playwright2). All persisted in MongoDB `contacts` collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py â€” 4/4 pass; GET /api/contacts now returns objects with `id` only (no `_id`). Nav testids are LOWERCASE: `nav-studie`, `nav-proces`, `nav-priser`, `nav-udgivelser`, `nav-artister`, `nav-kontakt` (and `mobile-nav-<label>` likewise). SectionHeader labels render UPPERCASE in DOM ('03 PRISER' not '03 Priser'). Pricing featured/highlighted card is index 1 (`price-card-1` = Hverdags-session). Use `window.lenis.scrollTo('#id',{immediate:true})` for instant navigation since Lenis intercepts native scroll. Mobile horizontal-overflow root cause is inside #artister grid â€” fix by adding `min-w-0` to grid children.
rca of the issue: Mobile #artister overflow: tailwind grid items default to `min-width:auto` (= min-content). The video-list buttons contain non-truncated content and the iframe-wrapper has `aspect-video` with `w-full`, so on a 390px viewport the grid column resolves to ~392px (content-driven), causing the entire section to be 22px wider than the viewport. Fix: add `min-w-0` to both the `lg:col-span-2` Reveal wrapper and the `flex flex-col` list container (and ideally `truncate` on the inner text), so children honor the parent width.
